body_html_quoted.html:
Hi Stan

Just checking in — we still have a few Thanksgiving Eve pickup/delivery spots open.

If you want to review the Thanksgiving menu again, I attached it below for you.

Want me to save a spot for your order?
Just reply YES and I’ll lock it in.

or you can CLICK HERE to order








Best,

🔥 Comeketo Catering Events Team
Comeketo Catering
📘Facebook | 📸 Instagram | 🌐 Website
📲 My Direct: (978) 678 3739
📲 Catering Main: (978) 381-1212
